dialogue.speaker: Alex
dialogue.text: Good morning, Sam! Are you ready for our meeting today?

dialogue.speaker: Sam
dialogue.text: Yes! We meet every Monday, but this one is special. The charity team will be here in an hour.

dialogue.speaker: Alex
dialogue.text: I know. I'm a bit nervous. Did you check your inbox? They sent us the address for the new office.

dialogue.speaker: Sam
dialogue.text: I did. It's on Hill Street in London. By the way, I'm holding the bags with all our presentation materials.

dialogue.speaker: Alex
dialogue.text: Perfect. We need to give them the research about our health programs. This is our chance to get their support.

dialogue.speaker: Sam
dialogue.text: Absolutely. My brother gave me advice yesterday. He said to be clear about our goals and the money we need.

dialogue.speaker: Alex
dialogue.text: That's good advice. What time do we leave?

dialogue.speaker: Sam
dialogue.text: In fifteen minutes. I'll buy us some coffee first. Do you want something to eat?

dialogue.speaker: Alex
dialogue.text: Just a pastry, thanks. We should eat quickly.

dialogue.speaker: Sam
dialogue.text: Alex, we have a problem. I can't find the research documents. They're not in the bag!

dialogue.speaker: Alex
dialogue.text: What? Are you sure? Check again, please.

dialogue.speaker: Sam
dialogue.text: I checked three times. This is a disaster. What will we do?

dialogue.speaker: Alex
dialogue.text: Wait. Did you leave them at home? On your desk?

dialogue.speaker: Sam
dialogue.text: Oh no. I think... yes. I printed them last night but left them there.

dialogue.speaker: Alex
dialogue.text: Okay, don't stress. Can someone bring them to us? What about your roommate?

dialogue.speaker: Sam
dialogue.text: She's at work. But maybe I can call my neighbor. He usually helps me.

dialogue.speaker: Alex
dialogue.text: Do it now. We don't have much time. The delay will cause problems if we're not ready.

dialogue.speaker: Sam
dialogue.text: I'm calling him now. Hello? Yes, it's me. I need your help. Can you go to my apartment? There are papers on my desk...

dialogue.speaker: Alex
dialogue.text: Will he do it? What did he say?

dialogue.speaker: Sam
dialogue.text: He said yes! He'll bring them to the address in thirty minutes.

dialogue.speaker: Alex
dialogue.text: The charity team is here. They're waiting in the meeting room. Where is your neighbor?

dialogue.speaker: Sam
dialogue.text: He should be here any minute. I'll check my phone... yes! He's outside the door now.

dialogue.speaker: Alex
dialogue.text: Thank goodness. Go get the documents. I'll talk to them and buy us a few more minutes.

dialogue.speaker: Sam
dialogue.text: Okay. I'll be right back.

dialogue.speaker: Alex
dialogue.text: Everyone, thank you for meeting with us today. Sam will be here in just a moment with our research materials.

dialogue.speaker: Sam
dialogue.text: I'm back! Here are the documents. Sorry for the small delay.

dialogue.speaker: Alex
dialogue.text: Perfect. Now, let me answer your first question about our health programs. We work with doctors in eight different cities.

dialogue.speaker: Sam
dialogue.text: And this page shows the evidence of our success. Last month, we helped over two hundred people.

dialogue.speaker: Alex
dialogue.text: The meeting went well! They want to give us monthly support.

dialogue.speaker: Sam
dialogue.text: That's wonderful! I learned something today. I need to be more careful. No more mistakes like this.

dialogue.speaker: Alex
dialogue.text: We all make mistakes. The important thing is we solved the problem together. Good teamwork!
